approvalSource: Steve explicitly required the auditor to improve so red/yellow findings route into live backlog truth before source/extraction activation.
scopeSummary: Route actionable audit findings into existing live cards, new scoped cards, stale proof, approval-required blockers, or watch-only thresholds while scheduled audits remain report-only.
constraints: Do not turn scheduled audits into automatic backlog writers.
Do not implement audit findings inside this router card.
Do not leave card-shaped red/yellow recommendations only in markdown or JSON reports.
No live extraction, auth-required jobs, provider probes, model-spend, external writes, Drive mutation, Agent Feedback sends, or parallel builders.
